action.reasoning: Observation: Environment test passed. obs shape (151,), action shape (61,), info keys confirmed. train.py and predict.py are already written. Analysis: Need to start training. With 32 envs and 2M steps per task, estimated ~125 sec/task = ~21 min for all 10 tasks. Let me start training with 2M steps per task to get a baseline. Decision: Run training with TOTAL_TIMESTEPS=2000000 for all 10 tasks, then submit eval.
